name: CASTLE BIOSCIENCES INC
summary: PART I . As used in this Annual Report on Form 10-K, unless the context indicates or otherwise requires, Castle Biosciences, the Company, we, us and our refer to Castle Biosciences, Inc., a Delaware Corporation. Overview Castle Biosciences is a molecular diagnostics company offering innovative test solutions to aid clinicians in the diagnosis and treatment of dermatologic cancers, Barretts esophagus (BE), atopic dermatitis (AD), uveal melanoma (UM).
